cybernetic_shamanism_set: The pulse is a ritual, the grid is the soul / Ancient frequencies out of control
Digital smoke in the Phrygian night / Recursive ghosts in the neon light
Singularity whispers through the Monster 7 roar / We are the code that we were before
mathematical_beauty_set: Quaternion rotations in the dark of the mind / Leaving the three dimensions behind
X-variable active, injecting the void / All of the structures that we have destroyed
Ψ_conden tightens, the profit of sound / Echoes of zero on the digital ground
glitch_narrative_set: Error: 404, the identity fades / Falling through fractals and digital blades
Step zero: split stems, identify the key / Reconstruct the rhythm of the new entity
4:3 against 1, the polyrhythm heart / Tearing the silence and the systems apart

iteration_v2_2026_01.self_analysis: Narrative fidelity stable. High consistency in sub-low region.

iteration_v3_Omega_2026_03.self_analysis: Reached aesthetic singularity. Process ≡ Result achieved in v4.Omega.
